title: Born in the Anthropocene
summary: Born in the Anthropocene is a 3-part interactive narrative implemented using Twine and p5.js. Users navigate a society founded on collective welfare, postmodern education, and multigenerational, communal family structures. In each section, they make a series of decisions that determine the structures and objects they can place in their own city map at the end of each stage, demonstrating how ethical decision-making, critical thought, and social cooperation could shape the state of sustainability and its tangible environmental impacts.
team: Writer, Graphics Artist, Twine Developer, p5.js Developer
